author: mark
text:
Relocate last_fetch marker to ~/.cache/balls/<nested>/

bl ready throttled remote auto-fetch via an empty local_dir/last_fetch file under SPEC §3's catch-all bucket. That bucket has no SPEC home; this ball moves the marker into the reserved ~/.cache/balls/ slot — SPEC-clone-layout §3 names it as the home for derived/regenerable artifacts, empty in this layout; reserved.

Store::cache_dir() resolves to ~/.cache/balls/<nested-clone-path>/, honoring XDG_CACHE_HOME via XdgBases::from_env() and mirroring xdg_discover's state-root nesting. Lazy in the accessor — no Store field churn for the single caller. maybe_auto_fetch creates the directory on first write.

No migration: an absent marker means 'fetch now', same as first-run. Pre-XDG clones with .balls/local/last_fetch get one extra fetch on next bl ready.

Parent: bl-a11d (final-step Store::local_dir() retirement).
